summary: Plan-only classification for 10 hydrated open candidates. Security-sensitive refs are quarantined item-by-item; unrelated non-security items are split into prompt/context, Slack plugin regression, memory-prefix, and low-proof PR subfamilies.

actions.reason: Same prompt-budget family as #92451 but broader product scope and not safely closable as a duplicate.
Security-sensitive reasoning leakage report must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling, not backlog cleanup.
Distinct non-security Slack/plugin regression; no safe hydrated candidate fix is available in this plan.
Best hydrated non-routed representative PR for the #91804 fix attempt, but not mergeable or closable in plan mode.
Security-sensitive PR is out of scope for ProjectClownfish mutation and should be routed item-by-item.
Same general memory/ENOENT area as historical items but a distinct current reproduction claim, so it should stay open.
Related to #92372 by claimed issue link, but failing proof and unrelated diff shape block fixed-by-candidate or closure.
Best live canonical for the current prompt-bloat regression subcluster.
Related to #92451 by claimed issue link, but failing proof and weak diff fit block fixed-by-candidate or closure.
Security-sensitive/provider-secrets PR must be routed to central security handling and must not block non-security Slack issue classification.
